item.title: What Happened Today #127
item.description: We all had our phones out, refreshing for Trump-Musk reconciliation updates. Would they talk? Were aides scheduling calls? What about the Tesla? While we watched that soap opera, they were in back rooms rushing Supreme Court filings, planning immigration raids, and signing contracts. The grinding machinery of dismantling never paused. Now Trump's at Bedminster for the weekend, probably laughing at how easy it is to distract us while they demolish our country. Stay the course. Raise hell as you resist, and don't rely on the algorithm. Let me send this free and private summary to you every night so that you never miss what's going on. Add your email on the homepage of GovBrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://go.govbrief.today/china-talks-london 2. https://go.govbrief.today/job-growth-slows 3. https://go.govbrief.today/scotus-doge-social-security 4. https://go.govbrief.today/palantir-disease-data 5. https://go.govbrief.today/duffy-fuel-economy-standards 6. https://go.govbrief.today/epa-end-emissions-reporting 7. https://go.govbrief.today/gop-rep-xenophobic 8. https://go.govbrief.today/hegseth-investigation-obstruction 9. https://go.govbrief.today/va-staff-problems 10. https://go.govbrief.today/proud-boys-sue 11. https://go.govbrief.today/la-immigration-raids 12. https://go.govbrief.today/ice-ga-detention-center 13. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-fire-ed-employees 14. https://go.govbrief.today/judge-allows-library-museum 15. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-order-drones 16. https://go.govbrief.today/omb-ignore-gao 17. https://go.govbrief.today/wh-can-block-ap 18. https://go.govbrief.today/broadband-equity-changed 19. https://go.govbrief.today/chinese-exec-crypto-dinner 20. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-musk-fallout Yesterday's Story - https://go.govbrief.today/no-kings-map Fighting Back - https://go.govbrief.today/dems-cite-vance-precendent Subscribe (Free & Private) - https://govbrief.today P.S. Yes, I know I have to fix the intensity score container. I was too tired to login to the server tonight. I'll do it tomorrow.™
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Carefully Curated Crap, Vol. 506

1

15
16
17

19
20
21
22
23
24
25
Man Tax: Bruce Herbelin “The first draft of anything is shit.” ― Ernest Hemingway I try to keep my posts "good vibe zones". So, instead of finding the one thing in here you don't like and commenting on it, maybe let it go and find something that you do like. Love you long time. So, I made a discord server so you guys can donate memes to the museum for future CCC posts. I don't want to run out! Also, we can hang out. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: I dont think he gets it, there is no redemption
item.dc:creator: Grogu007

item.title: [OC] Detailed map of the Arctic with its main cities, physical features, connections, and sites of interest [4494x3178]
item.description: Hello everyone! I present you with the fifteenth map of my project to map every continent and region on Earth at the 1:6,000,000 scale in a detailed way, featuring the main cities, physical features, roads and connections, physical features, territories and other places of interest. Here's the list of completed and planned maps: 1. Europe ✅ - https://imgur.com/gallery/detailed-map-of-europe-with-its-main-cities-connections-places-of-interest-4494x3178-zLvOgYr#/t/maps 2. Northern Asia ✅ - https://imgur.com/gallery/detailed-map-of-northern-asia-with-its-main-cities-connections-sites-of-interest-4494x3178-lxbvCdN#/t/maps 3. Southwestern Asia ✅ - https://imgur.com/gallery/detailed-map-of-southwestern-asia-middle-east-south-asia-with-its-main-cities-physical-features-connections-sites-of-interest-4494x3178-jjBydX9#/t/maps 4. East Asia ✅ - https://imgur.com/gallery/oc-detailed-map-of-east-asia-with-its-main-cities-physical-features-connections-sites-of-interest-4494x3178-cDWy9mi#/t/maps 5. Southeast Asia ✅ - https://imgur.com/gallery/oc-detailed-map-of-southeast-asia-with-its-main-cities-physical-features-connections-sites-of-interest-4494x3178-A1dpdVb#/t/maps 6. Australia and New Zealand ✅ - https://imgur.com/gallery/oc-detailed-map-of-australia-new-zealand-with-main-cities-physical-features-connections-sites-of-interest-4494x3178-LadfeIJ#/t/maps 7. Northern Oceania ✅ - https://imgur.com/gallery/oc-detailed-map-of-northern-oceania-4494x3178-8CKkp4A#/t/maps 8. Southern Oceania ✅ - https://imgur.com/gallery/oc-detailed-map-of-southern-oceania-4494x3178-hzh1U0X 9. Northern Africa ✅ - https://imgur.com/gallery/oc-detailed-map-of-northern-africa-with-main-cities-physical-features-connections-sites-of-interest-4494x3178-ZPuPm08 10. Southern Africa ✅ - https://imgur.com/gallery/oc-detailed-map-of-southern-africa-with-main-cities-physical-features-connections-sites-of-interest-4494x3178-Cpce3Ju 11. Northern North America ✅ - https://imgur.com/gallery/oc-detailed-map-of-northern-north-america-canada-alaska-with-main-cities-physical-features-connections-sites-of-interest-4494x3178-CP8ZDs0#/t/maps 12. Southern North America ✅ - https://imgur.com/gallery/oc-detailed-map-of-southern-north-america-with-main-cities-physical-features-connections-sites-of-interest-4494x3178-H1DRYJm#/t/maps 13. Northern South America ✅ - https://imgur.com/gallery/oc-detailed-map-of-northern-south-america-with-main-cities-physical-features-connections-sites-of-interest-4494x3178-nwswJx3#/t/maps 14. Southern South America ✅ - https://imgur.com/gallery/oc-detailed-map-of-southern-south-america-with-main-cities-physical-features-connections-sites-of-interest-4494x3178-btAb2or#/t/maps 15. The Arctic ✅ 16. Antarctica My plan is to post them here weekly, since they are practically finished and all that is left is some refining. Feel free to post any suggestions or errors you find. I hope you enjoy the map as much as I enjoyed making it!
item.dc:creator: SenseFM

item.title: These were really challenging. But I kept working and they got better.
item.description: It was super challenging in the beginning. But I kept working hard and they got better. Next time will be even better. I hope everyone has a great weekend.

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1375 (challenge the rutabega)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
Dreamed I re-read Slaughterhouse Five by Kurt Vonnegut.
Listen, I have become unstuck in time.
Hahahahahaha.
A good third of Sedona.
Pippin definitely does.
Oops, should have saved this for a future Tolkien meme dump, whatever.
At least they got a better end to being man's friend than Pigeons did. We abandoned Pigeons the way exes abandon me, HEYYYO
The Lord God Bird is dead, and we killed it.
Grackles can mimic!
I wonder if anyone has taught their cockitiel to whistle the Jurassic Park theme.
I've done this more than I care to admit, so this meme was a personal attack.
I actually did this once, but it wasn't a kidnapping.
I dreamed of a meme, beyond my skill to make: The Emissary holds aloft... not a glass, but a bowl of cereal. "Eat Sisk-O's. The cereal you can live with. Part of a balanced breakfast."
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "what?" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? (If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them and tell them they're free to message me.) 3) Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 4) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 5) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Same gams 3 years later...
item.description: I'm on a weight loss journey. 77lbs down from 285 in December. I love jamming out to music while working out at the gym 4-5 times a week. I could use some playlist recommendations. Any genre as long as it's upbeat to get my heart pumping!
item.dc:creator: Sugarbritches21

item.title: Pride Month ?️‍⚧️
item.description:
I grew these myself with pizza and spironolactone
Rise for the flag. Now..... I'm not asking
Bert and Ernie from the 1987 a muppet family Christmas which features Bert is Mama and Ernie as Papa in a rehearsal of Clemoth Moore's Twas the Night Before Christmas. Originally they were intended to be background characters from It's a Wonderful Life Bert is the police officer and Ernie is the cab driver and they live together gay and clearly in love they bicker but they show us that they don't have to use violence to resolve their problems
Yeah so that's what's going on
Bart is in the local gays show their pride headline for Springfield but Milhouse is the one the psychologist thinks is gay and probably is Milhouse does like they'll dress up like ladies The Simpsons writers are absolute cowards for not having Barton middle House end up together in the future it's it's absolute dog s*** homophobia Milhouse with Lisa that's that's ridiculous that's absurd I don't buy it for a second
Quite accurate actually
Fred from Scooby-Doo sees that ass
I like big women I am big women
I don't know who I stole this from but I totally stole this from somebody
The Dragon shield Black Ranger and I'm very glad that they gave him that title and those words in that exact order and in no other order
I don't know I'm trying my best you guys
For some reason this to me screams gay pride Captain America about to f****** give the craziest high five to Space Ghost
I drew these myself
I had to like sit there and sketch this for a few hours
Jesus loves to watch
It's Riley Black's chatty little cat I'm pretty sure it's a delightful little monster
It's me I'm doing my best I don't know what you guys want
item.dc:creator: JessicaStrong
